mapper.select: SELECT c.total, c.platform, c.partner, c.waiting, m.issuedThisMonth, m.usedThisMonth FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN partner_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS platform, SUM(CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partner, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting FROM coupon ) c, ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS issuedThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'USED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS usedThisMonth FROM member_coupon WHERE issued_at = SYSDATE ) m

SELECT t.couponId, t.partnerId, t.partnerName, t.couponName, t.discountAmount, t.discountType, t.maxDiscountAmount, t.minOrderAmount, t.platformShare, t.partnerShare, t.validFrom, t.validUntil, t.status, t.createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.member_coupon_id = t.couponId) AS issuedCount FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, c.valid_from AS validFrom, c.valid_until AS validUntil, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN partner p ON c.partner_id = p.partner_id
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC ) t WHERE t.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, c.valid_from AS validFrom, c.valid_until AS validUntil, c.status, 0 AS issuedCount, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN partner p ON c.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE c.status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, c.valid_from AS validFrom, c.valid_until AS validUntil, c.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id) AS issuedCount, c.created_at AS createdAt, issue_condition_type AS issueConditionType, issue_condition_value AS issueConditionValue FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN partner p ON c.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE c.coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( coupon_id, partner_id, coupon_name, discount_amount, discount_type, max_discount_amount, min_order_amount, platform_share, partner_share, valid_from, valid_until, status, issue_condition_type, issue_condition_value, created_at ) VALUES ( coupon_seq.NEXTVAL, #{partnerId}, #{couponName}, #{discountAmount}, #{discountType}, #{maxDiscountAmount}, #{minOrderAmount}, #{platformShare}, 100 - #{platformShare}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, 'ACTIVE', #{issueConditionType}, #{issueConditionValue}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_name = #{req.couponName}, discount_amount = #{req.discountAmount}, discount_type = #{req.discountType}, max_discount_amount = #{req.maxDiscountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, min_order_amount = #{req.minOrderAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, platform_share = #{req.platformShare}, partner_share = 100 - #{req.platformShare}, valid_from = #{req.validFrom}, valid_until = #{req.validUntil}, issue_condition_type = #{req.issueConditionType}, issue_condition_value = #{req.issueConditionValue} WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName FROM partner WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY partner_name

SELECT coupon_id AS couponId, partner_id AS partnerId, coupon_name AS couponName, discount_amount AS discountAmount, discount_type AS discountType, max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, platform_share AS platformShare, partner_share AS partnerShare, valid_from AS validFrom, valid_until AS validUntil, status, issue_condition_type AS issueConditionType, issue_condition_value AS issueConditionValue FROM coupon WHERE issue_condition_type = #{conditionType} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_target (target_id, coupon_id, target_type, target_value, is_exclude) VALUES (coupon_target_seq.NEXTVAL, #{couponId}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue}, #{isExclude})
mapper.select: SELECT target_id AS targetId, coupon_id AS couponId, target_type AS targetType, target_value AS targetValue, is_exclude AS isExclude FROM coupon_target WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} ORDER BY is_exclude, target_type, target_id

SELECT a.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS name, a.accommodation_type AS accommodationType FROM accommodation a LEFT JOIN place p ON a.place_id = p.place_id
AND ( p.place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND a.accommodation_type = #{accType}
ORDER BY p.place_name
SELECT DISTINCT accommodation_type FROM accommodation WHERE accommodation_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY accommodation_type
SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_name AS roomName, r.roombasecount AS roombasecount, r.max_capacity AS maxCapacity FROM room r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.room_name
